name: Captains:The Chosen Few
overview: The qualifiers for the 2022 FIFA World Cup are in full swing. Captain Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang prepares his golden generation Gabon team in a massive match against Mo Salah’s Egypt. Injury gives Croatia captain and Ballon D'or winner Luka Modric the chance to reflect where it all began. Jamaica captain Andre Blake must unite a team of players, all with big ideas and bigger egos.
